## What

Briefly describe the change and the motivation.

## Checklist

- [ ] `make test` (or `go test -race ./...`) passes
- [ ] `gofmt -l .` prints nothing and `go vet ./...` is clean
- [ ] New logic has tests (parsers are pure and table-driven where possible)
- [ ] README / CHANGELOG updated if behavior or config changed

## Notes

Anything reviewers should know (trade-offs, follow-ups, out-of-scope items).
